sections.title: Accommodation
sections.summary: Accommodation arrangements vary considerably by club.

insights.text: Many ISL clubs provide accommodation for foreign players rather than requiring them to rent privately.
Accommodation ranges from hotels and serviced apartments to club-managed apartment complexes.

examples.fact: Foreign players reportedly stay at the Crowne Plaza in Kochi.
The club reportedly operates a dedicated residential and training campus.

sources.title: Where do foreign players stay during ISL and I-League?
sources.evidence: Multiple commenters reported that ISL clubs generally provide accommodation. Examples mentioned included Kerala Blasters, Bengaluru FC, FC Goa, Delhi Dynamos and Jamshedpur FC.
